summary: Phase 53 DocFlow Enhancement Testing: Verified ConfirmSubmitDialog for package signing, signature modal reset, Next button navigation, Page/Scroll view modes, and backend API endpoints. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed key features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ConfirmSubmitDialog.js: Well-implemented reusable modal with proper data-testid attributes, tone variants (indigo/emerald/red), and submitting state handling
SignatureModal.js: Reset logic on isOpen correctly clears mode, typedText, selectedFont, hasDrawn, applyToAll - prevents signature text bleeding into Initials modal
PackagePublicView.js: Acknowledgement checkbox removed, replaced with ConfirmSubmitDialog for Sign/Review/Approve flows with role-specific titles and tones
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: DATE_FORMATS array supports MM/DD/YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, MMM DD, YYYY; formatDate function properly handles all formats
MultiPageVisualBuilder.js: Date field defaults to label='Date Signed' and dateFormat='MM/DD/YYYY'; Radio fields support defaultChecked and hideLabelOnFinal properties
package_public_routes.py: Radio embed logic correctly renders only selected option with filled circle, respects hideLabelOnFinal, uses groupName-based selection
test_credentials: test@gmail.com / test123 (CRM platform), docflow@test.com / DocFlow123! (DocFlow module disabled)
seed_data_creation: Used existing package: f7bafd9d-b180-42fe-b8e9-83bee84da65a with token 4d8ee67f-ad3b-44a5-a097-e1c1e8b2969c
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 53 enhancements verified: (1) ConfirmSubmitDialog replaces acknowledgement checkbox for package signing - shows 'Confirm signing' title with 'Confirm & Sign' button. (2) Signature modal resets state on open (prevents text bleed-through). (3) Next button navigation works in Page mode. (4) Page/Scroll view mode toggle present. (5) Backend radio embed only renders selected option. (6) Date format defaults to MM/DD/YYYY with 'Date Signed' label. Test package available at /docflow/package/f7bafd9d-b180-42fe-b8e9-83bee84da65a/view/4d8ee67f-ad3b-44a5-a097-e1c1e8b2969c
